verdict: An outstandingly well-timed Easy chart that perfectly captures the vocal syncopation and structures the physical density to match the song's energy.

issues.problem: Tapping D at 12.472 while holding R introduces a hold-active step. This is a minor difficulty spike for an Easy chart, though it is executed cleanly.
The isolated eighth note at 4.226 might catch absolute beginners off guard so early in the song, though it accurately matches the 'knows' lyric.
